title: Beta System Update
body:
**SkorionOS 55-6**
- Improve OneXPlayer support, add OneXPlayer APEX support
- Improve Steam game mode system update announcement injection
- Update support for GPD Win5 controller firmware 1.10

[/list]

title: System Update
body:
**SkorionOS 55-6**
- Improve OneXPlayer support, add OneXPlayer APEX support
- Improve Steam game mode system update announcement injection
- Update support for GPD Win5 controller firmware 1.10

**SkorionOS 55-5**
- Kernel 7.0 rc
- Mesa 26.0.4
- Fixed gyroscope not working after sleep on GPD Win5
- Added gyroscope support for MSI Claw and ClawA8
- Component updates
bbcode_body:
[b]SkorionOS 55-6[/b]
[list]
[*] Improve OneXPlayer support, add OneXPlayer APEX support
[*] Improve Steam game mode system update announcement injection
[*] Update support for GPD Win5 controller firmware 1.10
[/list]

[b]SkorionOS 55-5[/b]
[list]
[*] Kernel 7.0 rc
[*] Mesa 26.0.4
[*] Fixed gyroscope not working after sleep on GPD Win5
[*] Added gyroscope support for MSI Claw and ClawA8
[*] Component updates
[/list]
html_body:
SkorionOS 55-6

  • Improve OneXPlayer support, add OneXPlayer APEX support
  • Improve Steam game mode system update announcement injection
  • Update support for GPD Win5 controller firmware 1.10

SkorionOS 55-5

  • Kernel 7.0 rc
  • Mesa 26.0.4
  • Fixed gyroscope not working after sleep on GPD Win5
  • Added gyroscope support for MSI Claw and ClawA8
  • Component updates

title: 系统更新
body:
**SkorionOS 55-6**
- 完善 OneXPlayer 支持, 添加 OneXPlayer APEX 适配
- 完善 Steam 游戏模式系统更新公告注入功能
- 更新支持 GPD Win5 控制器固件 1.10

**SkorionOS 55-5**
- 内核 7.0 rc
- Mesa 26.0.4
- 修复了 GPD Win5 在睡眠唤醒后陀螺仪失效的问题
- 为 MSI Claw 和 ClawA8 添加了陀螺仪支持
- 组件更新
bbcode_body:
[b]SkorionOS 55-6[/b]
[list]
[*] 完善 OneXPlayer 支持, 添加 OneXPlayer APEX 适配
[*] 完善 Steam 游戏模式系统更新公告注入功能
[*] 更新支持 GPD Win5 控制器固件 1.10
[/list]

[b]SkorionOS 55-5[/b]
[list]
[*] 内核 7.0 rc
[*] Mesa 26.0.4
[*] 修复了 GPD Win5 在睡眠唤醒后陀螺仪失效的问题
[*] 为 MSI Claw 和 ClawA8 添加了陀螺仪支持
[*] 组件更新
[/list]
html_body:
SkorionOS 55-6

  • 完善 OneXPlayer 支持, 添加 OneXPlayer APEX 适配
  • 完善 Steam 游戏模式系统更新公告注入功能
  • 更新支持 GPD Win5 控制器固件 1.10

SkorionOS 55-5

  • 内核 7.0 rc
  • Mesa 26.0.4
  • 修复了 GPD Win5 在睡眠唤醒后陀螺仪失效的问题
  • 为 MSI Claw 和 ClawA8 添加了陀螺仪支持
  • 组件更新

title: 测试公告 2026-04
body:
**外面有群了的七大表现** 🌚
1. 越来越少在群里发言
2. 对群里发言开始不耐烦
3. 不再跟群友分享见闻
4. 不再关心群友的情绪
5. 对群名的改变不在意
6. 拒绝和群友分享
7. 复读越来越慢
